name: Discovery Limited
sub_sector: Integrated health, life, savings, short-term insurance, banking and wellness (Vitality Shared-value model)

annual_reports.notes: FY results ~mid-September (FY2025 results released 11 Sep 2025). Full audited AFS PDF via JSE: senspdf.jse.co.za/documents/2025/JSE/ISSE/DSY/FY2025.pdf. Suite of PDFs on discovery.co.za: discovery-integrated-annual-report.pdf, discovery-annual-financial-statements.pdf, discovery-remuneration-report.pdf, plus a results booklet, results presentation and an 'additional-analyst-information.pdf' analyst pack (carries embedded value, VNB and solvency tables). Asset path pattern: https://www.discovery.co.za/wcm/discoverycoza/assets/investor-relations/<year>/<file>.pdf and https://www.discovery.co.za/assets/discoverycoza/corporate/investor-relations/<year>/<file>.pdf

interim_reports.notes: Interim (6 months to 31 Dec) reported early March. H1 FY2026 (to 31 Dec 2025) presented 3 Mar 2026 (webcast corpcam.com/Discovery03032026). Interim 'results-booklet.pdf' sits under the .../investor-relations/<year>/ path (NOTE: the 2025-folder results-booklet.pdf is the H1 FY2025 booklet for the six months to 31 Dec 2024; the H1 FY2026 booklet is under the 2026 folder).

trading_statements.notes: Pre-results trading statements / operational updates via SENS (e.g. 'Trading statement for the financial year ended 30 June 2025' and 'Operational update and trading statement for the six-month period ended 31 December 2025'). HEPS guidance triggered at +/-20% thresholds per JSE rules.

sens.notes: SENS via Sharenet (scode DSY) - full short-form text retrievable (e.g. sens_display.php?tdate=YYYYMMDDhhmmss&seq=N). Also Moneyweb click-a-company/DSY and sharedata.co.za (DSY). JSE senspdf binaries time out via web_fetch (large) - use Sharenet HTML text.

investor_presentations.notes: Results presentation PDF published alongside results under the .../investor-relations/<year>/ path. 'additional-analyst-information.pdf' is the detailed analyst pack (EV, VNB, solvency).

press_releases.notes: Company newsroom. Also mynewsdesk.com/za/discovery-holdings-ltd for results press releases.

next_expected_results.notes: Full-year results to 30 Jun 2026 expected ~mid-September 2026 (FY2025 released 11 Sep 2025; exact date TBC per IR calendar). H1 FY2026 interim results (to 31 Dec 2025) were the most recent, presented 3 Mar 2026. Annual results presentation date and AGM date shown as 'To be confirmed' on the IR site as at 17 Jun 2026.

notes: Discovery Limited (JSE: DSY) is a global integrated financial services / insurance group built on the Vitality Shared-value Insurance model. FY ends 30 June. Founder Group CEO Adrian Gore (executive); Chairperson ME Tucker (UK); Group CFO DM Viljoen; co-founder Barry Swartzberg now CEO: Vitality (from 7 Aug 2024). Reports IFRS in ZAR; offshore operations (VitalityHealth UK, VitalityLife UK, Vitality Global / Vitality Network, Ping An Health China associate) are translated from GBP/USD/RMB. As of FY2025 the group is organised into two composites: (1) Discovery South Africa (Discovery Health which administers Discovery Health Medical Scheme, Discovery Life, Discovery Invest, Discovery Insure, Discovery Bank); and (2) Vitality (VitalityHealth UK, VitalityLife UK, Vitality Network/Vitality Global, and the Ping An Health Insurance (PAHI) China associate, equity-accounted). FY2025 (yr to 30 Jun 2025): normalised operating profit R15 210m (+29%); normalised headline earnings R9 781m (+30%); normalised HEPS 1 470.4c (+29%); normalised ROE 15.4% (13.5% pcp); RoEV 15.7%; embedded value R126.6bn; EV/share R189.85; FLR 16.8% (20.3% pcp); cash conversion 77%. Discovery Bank turned its first profit in H2 FY2025 (ahead of plan) and reached monthly profitability in Dec 2025; H1 FY2026 group NOP +24% to R8.9bn. Joint auditors KPMG Inc. & Deloitte & Touche (unmodified opinion). Largest individual shareholder is founder Adrian Gore (~6.7% per public reporting; verify against AFS directors' interests). Watch items: NHI (National Health Insurance) policy risk to Discovery Health/DHMS; UK/offshore FX translation; Discovery Bank scaling economics; PAHI China.
